templates.name: Code Server
templates.description: VS Code in the browser. Access a full development environment from any device.
templates.userDataTemplate:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: {{username}}
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: false
    passwd: {{password_hash}}
    ssh_authorized_keys:
{{ssh_keys_yaml}}
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - qemu-guest-agent
  - curl
  - git
  - build-essential
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent
  - curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh
  - systemctl enable --now code-server@{{username}}
  - |
    mkdir -p /home/{{username}}/.config/code-server
    cat > /home/{{username}}/.config/code-server/config.yaml <<CEOF
    bind-addr: 0.0.0.0:8080
    auth: password
    password: {{password}}
    cert: false
    CEOF
    chown -R {{username}}:{{username}} /home/{{username}}/.config
  - systemctl restart code-server@{{username}}

templates.name: Home Assistant
templates.description: Smart home automation platform. Uses the official Home Assistant OS image.

templates.name: Pi-hole
templates.description: Network-wide DNS ad blocker. Lightweight and effective.
templates.userDataTemplate:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: {{username}}
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: false
    passwd: {{password_hash}}
    ssh_authorized_keys:
{{ssh_keys_yaml}}
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - qemu-guest-agent
  - curl
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent
  - mkdir -p /etc/pihole
  - |
    cat > /etc/pihole/setupVars.conf <<PVEOF
    PIHOLE_INTERFACE=eth0
    QUERY_LOGGING=true
    INSTALL_WEB_SERVER=true
    INSTALL_WEB_INTERFACE=true
    LIGHTTPD_ENABLED=true
    WEBPASSWORD=$(echo -n {{password}} | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}' | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}')
    BLOCKING_ENABLED=true
    PIHOLE_DNS_1=1.1.1.1
    PIHOLE_DNS_2=8.8.8.8
    PVEOF
  - curl -sSL https://install.pi-hole.net | bash /dev/stdin --unattended

templates.name: Nextcloud
templates.description: Self-hosted file sync, sharing, and collaboration platform.

inputs.label: Password
inputs.placeholder: Used for system user and Nextcloud admin

templates.userDataTemplate:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: {{username}}
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: false
    passwd: {{password_hash}}
    ssh_authorized_keys:
{{ssh_keys_yaml}}
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - qemu-guest-agent
  - apache2
  - mariadb-server
  - php
  - php-gd
  - php-mysql
  - php-curl
  - php-mbstring
  - php-intl
  - php-gmp
  - php-bcmath
  - php-xml
  - php-imagick
  - php-zip
  - php-apcu
  - libapache2-mod-php
  - unzip
  - curl
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent
  - mysql -e "CREATE DATABASE nextcloud;"
  - mysql -e "CREATE USER 'nextcloud'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY '{{password}}';"
  - mysql -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON nextcloud.* TO 'nextcloud'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"
  - curl -Lo /tmp/nextcloud.zip https://download.nextcloud.com/server/releases/latest.zip
  - unzip -q /tmp/nextcloud.zip -d /var/www/
  - chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/nextcloud
  - |
    cat > /etc/apache2/sites-available/nextcloud.conf <<NCEOF
    <VirtualHost *:80>
      DocumentRoot /var/www/nextcloud
      <Directory /var/www/nextcloud>
        Require all granted
        AllowOverride All
        Options FollowSymLinks MultiViews
      </Directory>
    </VirtualHost>
    NCEOF
  - a2ensite nextcloud.conf
  - a2dissite 000-default.conf
  - a2enmod rewrite headers env dir mime
  - systemctl restart apache2
  - sudo -u www-data php /var/www/nextcloud/occ maintenance:install --database mysql --database-name nextcloud --database-user nextcloud --database-pass {{password}} --admin-user {{admin_user}} --admin-pass {{password}}
  - sudo -u www-data php /var/www/nextcloud/occ config:system:set trusted_domains 0 --value='*'

templates.name: OpenCode
templates.description: AI-powered terminal coding agent. Runs OpenCode with Node.js and common dev tools pre-installed.
templates.userDataTemplate:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: {{username}}
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: false
    passwd: {{password_hash}}
    ssh_authorized_keys:
{{ssh_keys_yaml}}
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - qemu-guest-agent
  - curl
  - git
  - build-essential
  - unzip
  - jq
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent
  - curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  - apt-get install -y nodejs
  - npm install -g opencode-ai
  - |
    if [ -n "{{anthropic_api_key}}" ]; then
      echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="{{anthropic_api_key}}"' >> /home/{{username}}/.bashrc
    fi
  - echo 'OpenCode VM ready. Run: opencode' > /etc/motd
  - chown -R {{username}}:{{username}} /home/{{username}}

templates.name: Cline
templates.description: AI coding agent that runs in your terminal. Pre-configured with Node.js, Git, and common development tools.
templates.userDataTemplate:
#cloud-config
users:
  - name: {{username}}
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: false
    passwd: {{password_hash}}
    ssh_authorized_keys:
{{ssh_keys_yaml}}
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - qemu-guest-agent
  - curl
  - git
  - build-essential
  - unzip
  - ripgrep
  - fd-find
  - jq
runcmd:
  - systemctl enable --now qemu-guest-agent
  - curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -
  - apt-get install -y nodejs
  - npm install -g cline
  - |
    if [ -n "{{anthropic_api_key}}" ]; then
      echo 'export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="{{anthropic_api_key}}"' >> /home/{{username}}/.bashrc
    fi
  - echo 'Cline VM ready. Run: cline' > /etc/motd
  - chown -R {{username}}:{{username}} /home/{{username}}
